one_liner: Midwest regulated electric and gas utility compounding rate-base earnings through a $30.5–33.1B 2026–2030 capex plan; fairly priced bond-proxy at ~7% base return.
key_assumptions: Normalized owner cash $5.10/sh from FY2025 diluted EPS $5.35 less regulatory-lag haircut
Rate-base growth 6% years 1–5 and 5% years 6–7 from filed capex plan
Selling multiple 17× year-7 owner cash in base case
Component sum base $111.53/sh: engine $113 + large-load option $3 − minority $0.47 − dilution reserve $4
open_questions: Illinois MYRP appeal outcomes and timing on allowed returns
Size and timing of ~$4B equity issuance vs ATM/DRPlus execution
Large-load/data-center pipeline conversion to earned ROE by 2032
